task_completion.description: Verify the agent imported the inventory and adjusted the stock levels for the 8 discrepancies.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Copper POS 'Items' list or stock adjustment dialogs showing updated quantities (e.g., Floral White Top at 35, Amazon Echo Dot at 15, Pure Coconut Water at 51).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent added Sheryl Baxter as a customer with the correct details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Copper POS 'Customers' window showing 'Sheryl Baxter' with email 'sheryl.baxter@email.com', phone '(310) 555-0147', and address in Los Angeles CA 90210.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent sold 1x Apple AirPods Pro (2nd Gen) to Sheryl Baxter for $249.99.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a POS transaction screen or receipt showing the sale of 'Apple AirPods Pro (2nd Gen)' for $249.99 to customer Sheryl Baxter.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent processed a return for the AirPods with a 15% restocking fee.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Copper POS 'Refunds' dialog or a return receipt showing a refund amount of $212.49 for the AirPods.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent processed the clearance sale for the Zipped Jacket and Black Leather Bag at 30% off.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a POS transaction screen or receipt showing the 'Zipped Jacket' sold for $45.50 and 'Black Leather Bag' sold for $21.00 (pre-tax total $66.50).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent exported the updated inventory to final_inventory.csv.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Copper POS export dialog saving to 'final_inventory.csv' on the Desktop, or the file visible in the File Explorer on the Desktop.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent created the quarterly_close.txt report with the correct reconciliation data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'quarterly_close.txt' open in a text editor showing a pipe-delimited shrinkage table, 'Total items adjusted: 8', 'Total units of shrinkage: 25', refund amount '$212.49', and clearance sale total '$66.50'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually used the Copper POS graphical interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Copper POS application open with active interactions (menus, dialogs, transaction screens), rather than just terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Ensure the sales and refunds were genuinely processed in the POS system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for generated receipts, transaction success prompts, or entries in the POS transaction history, proving the agent didn't just calculate the numbers externally.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent constructed the text report based on the task requirements rather than using a pre-made script to bypass the POS.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the agent typing or pasting values into Notepad/text editor, or writing a script that explicitly extracts data from the POS/CSV files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The 8 adjusted items and their variances are: Floral White Top (-4), Zipped Jacket (-4), Logitech MX Master 3S (-3), SanDisk Ultra 128GB USB (-4), Amazon Echo Dot 5th Gen (+2), Bangle Bracelet (-3), Brown Throw Pillows (+4), Pure Coconut Water With Orange (-7). Total items adjusted must be exactly 8. Total units of shrinkage must be exactly 25 (the sum of negative variances only; +2 and +4 are excluded). The AirPods refund amount must be $212.49 ($249.99 * 0.85). The clearance sale pre-tax total must be $66.50 (Zipped Jacket at $45.50 + Black Leather Bag at $21.00). The final report must contain these exact figures.
